inactive?"
The Master answers-With Mars-Venus conjunctio'n before
the transit of the Moon in Taurus, the native's wife would have given
birth to male child and only later she goes away with the Chandala in
elopement. Venus transits Cancer in the 3rd year and Virgo in the
5th year .after elopement-These are hard times for the native's wife as
Venus is conjunct Rahu in Virgo. It is only when Jupiter transits Leo, the
native will be happy as his wife will come back and he will live upto a good
old age of72.' Thus, we do delineate married life. Bl}t great care should b,e
taken in making such predictions.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 15
The disciple questions-Guruj~. can we know from the child's
chart that the boy born to the native before 'the mother's elopment
will be denied the motherly care and love for some years? Kindly elucidate,
if you have details?
